name: Milf Neighbor In Your Bed - Sandra
description:
You get back to your place, walk up to your room. To your surprise you find the neighbor wife, Sandra, passed out drunk on your bed with nothing but her panties on. You find out that her husband kicked her out and your mom is letting her stay with you guys and offered her your room.

I might end up adding more intros. But My bot is right where I want it right now.

Since janitor always gets on my ass, heres the original pic: https://im.ge/i/QMIJBqM
